description: Trigger evals: 8 should-trigger queries (real-world irreversible workflows with runbooks), 8 should-not-trigger queries (ordinary engineering, code, design, hardware shopping).

evals.query: ok i'm finally going to file the EIN for my LLC tonight, the runbook is at docs/runbooks/ein-application.md. Can you walk me through the IRS SS-4 online assistant field by field? I have my SSN and the NAICS code we picked written down.

all three members are on a zoom and we're ready to sign the operating agreement. docs/business/operating-agreement-walkthrough.md is the runbook. hold my hand through the docusign flow and log the signed copy properly.

appointment at chase tomorrow morning to open the business bank account. i have the EIN letter, the OA, and my license. runbook is in docs/runbooks/business-banking.md, can we walk through what i'll need to fill in and how to capture the artifacts after

first time pushing a build to testflight ever for this app, app store connect record doesn't exist yet. there's a runbook at docs/releases/first-testflight.md. walk me through provisioning + the asc record + the upload, this is the irreversible "locks bundle id to team" thing.

BOI filing is due next week, fincen.gov walkthrough please. our beneficial owner data lives in docs/business/boi-filing.md as the runbook. need someone to narrate the form because i absolutely do not want to fat-finger an SSN on a federal filing.

i'm going to set up wave bookkeeping and connect the chase business account this afternoon. runbook docs/runbooks/wave-setup.md has the chart of accounts. can you walk through it and at the end log the connection in the entity register

ready to sign the contractor agreement with our designer -- it's a real legal doc, runbook is docs/business/contractor-onboarding.md. pls hold my hand thru it, then handle the records updates and a PR

i have to file the annual statement of information with california SOS today, $20 fee, deadline is friday. runbook docs/runbooks/ca-soi.md. walk me through bizfile, capture the receipt as an artifact, log the filing date in the entity register.

can you review this PR? it's a refactor of the auth service to use a new session token format. branch is feat/session-tokens, ~600 LOC. mainly want feedback on the migration path and whether the test coverage is adequate.

my docker compose is failing with "network not found" when i bring up the postgres + redis stack. compose file is in infra/. what's the right way to debug this -- is it a stale network from a previous up?
thinking about upgrading react-router from v5 to v6 in our admin dashboard. what's the migration story look like? we have ~40 routes and a bunch of nested layouts. is there a codemod?
i think there's a bug in our pagination -- when you scroll past page 5 the cursor resets and you start seeing duplicates from page 1. can you look at src/api/feed.ts and figure out what's going on?
audit this swiftui screen for accessibility please -- views/SettingsView.swift. dynamic type, color contrast, voiceover labels. iOS 18 target.

trying to decide between the M4 macbook air 15" and the M4 pro 14" for general dev work + occasional video editing. mostly want to know about thermals and ram headroom for ios builds. no rush, just curious.
how do i rebase my feature branch onto the latest main when there are merge conflicts in package-lock.json? do i delete and regenerate it or actually resolve them?
what should i work on next on this project? prd is docs/prd.md, we just shipped the onboarding flow yesterday. trying to figure out which milestone to tackle next.
